priority_notes: deprecated_assets.json overrides this file for asset eligibility.
visual_rules.json controls brand and forbidden visual semantics.

current_brand_assets.allowed_use: primary logo in upper-right logo zone
current_brand_assets.visual_description: modern blue HelioGrid wordmark with green pulse accent

approved_hero_directions.allowed_use: main hero visual or secondary visual cue
approved_hero_directions.visual_description: solar panels, battery backup, and clean energy flow lines

not_for_primary_use.reason: red-dominant background conflicts with current launch palette
cartoon mascot conflicts with clean technical launch style
